svg.title: socialIO full system design — overview
svg.desc: Five-layer structural diagram: client, gateway, services, real-time bus, and data persistence

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the client layer in detail')
g.text: Next.js 15 · Tailwind · shadcn/ui · TanStack Query · Zustand · Socket.IO client
auth middleware · REST routes · WS upgrade
